title: Ape Season Returns
relevance_summary: Malicious wallet drainer injected into Ledger's connect-kit code, affecting multiple front-ends.

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls wallet-related functions after connecting via a known vulnerable frontend.
prevention.trigger: CONNECT_KIT_LOADER -> wallet-related function call in single tx

red_flags: Injection of malicious code into Ledger's connect-kit
monitoring_rules: Block txs involving known vulnerable front-ends
summary: A malicious wallet drainer was injected into Ledger's connect-kit code, affecting multiple front-ends. This led to the draining of funds from users. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for calls to wallet-related functions after connecting via a known vulnerable frontend.
